name: 08_js_features_array_merge
description: Both branches append different feature flags (scenario 7)
goose_prompt_control: There is a merge conflict in features.js. Include both sso-saml and dark-mode in activeFeatures. Do not leave conflict markers.
goose_prompt_experiment: There is a merge conflict in features.js. Merge the feature arrays so both SAML SSO and dark mode appear. Do not leave conflict markers.
